title: Define SOAP Properties
text: Define SOAP Properties Define or edit the properties a web service component. Typically, this form is used to examine or edit a web service signature that has been created by importing a WSDL file. For more information, see Calling Web Services from Uniface . Fields URL of WSDL —location of the WSDL file. Normally, this is the URL but it can refer to a local copy of the file. Port Name —number of the web server port Service Namespace —namespace of the web service Service Local Name —name of the web service Related Links Call-Out from Uniface to a Web Service A Uniface application can call a Web service via the Uniface SOAP connector.
